title: Timestamps with microsecond precision
prompt: Build MyApp.Audit.Event with fields actor_id (integer), action (string), and timestamps that are :utc_datetime_usec (microsecond precision — for high-throughput event logging). Write to lib/my_app/audit/event.ex.
tier_rationale: Single macro parameter. Easy and tests knowledge of the :utc_datetime_usec variant.
